data.title: Arizona Eyes ‘Tax-Free’ Status: New Bill Seeks to Ban Local Crypto Taxes
data.description:
Arizona lawmakers have introduced new bills that would exempt cryptocurrency from taxation and prohibit local governments from taxing blockchain activity across the state.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/arizona-bill-ban-local-crypto-taxes-fees/

data.title: Even Ethereum treasury companies are selling ETH to pay off debt
data.description:

source: https://protos.com/even-ethereum-treasury-companies-are-selling-eth-to-pay-off-debt/

data.title: XRP Sentiment Has Collapsed — And That May Be the Setup Bulls Are Waiting For
data.description:
XRP price has quietly slipped into an uncomfortable spot. The price is down about 9% over the past 30 days, momentum feels stale, and positive social chatter around the token has turned noticeably sour. At first glance, that looks like weakness. But XRP has a history of doing its best work when enthusiasm disappears
source: https://beincrypto.com/xrp-price-sentiment-problem-solution/

data.title: Bank of Russia Targets 2026 for Strict Crypto Regulation Framework and New Penalties
data.description:
The Bank of Russia plans to establish a comprehensive cryptocurrency regulatory framework by July 2026, introducing legal liability for intermediaries in the digital asset market.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/russia-crypto-regulation-central-bank-2026-deadline/

data.title: Trump Comments on Federal Reserve Chair Appointment
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that anyone opposing him will never be appointed as the Federal Reserve Chair. He also expressed his desire for the new Federal Reserve Chair to lower interest rates if the market performs well.

data.title: Trade détente with China leads to slow rollout of Trump’s chip levies
data.description:
President Donald Trump’s administration has decided not to impose new tariffs on semiconductor imports from China until June 2027, despite accusing Beijing of violating trade rules in the global chip market. The delay follows a quiet trade ceasefire that Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping reached in October during a meeting in South Korea, according […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trade-detente-with-china-trumps-chip-levies/

data.title: Telegram crypto black markets now make about $2 billion a month for China-based users
data.description:
Telegram now runs the largest crypto black-market economy ever documented, with Chinese-speaking users transacting literally $2 billion every month. According to an Elliptic’s investigation released this week, simple access to Telegram, the ability to relaunch banned channels, and Chinese-language moderation have replaced the technical barriers that once defined darknet crime. Elliptic estimates that one of […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/telegram-crypto-black-markets-china-users/

data.title: Ethereum Is Emerging as a Global Public Good – and That Changes How It Should Be Valued, Says William Mougayar
data.description:
Ethereum is no longer just another blockchain competing on speed or transaction fees. Instead, it is increasingly functioning as an Internet-scale public good — a shift that demands a fundamentally different way of thinking about value.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ethereum-is-emerging-as-a-global-public-good-and-that-changes-how-it-should-be-valued-says-william-mougayar/

data.title: Justin Sun’s Locked WLFI Tokens Lose $60 Million After Blacklist Freeze
data.description:
The value of Justin Sun’s frozen World Liberty Financial holdings has dropped sharply since they were locked in September, turning into one of the most notable paper losses tied to the Trump-linked crypto project.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/justin-suns-locked-wlfi-tokens-lose-60-million-after-blacklist-freeze/
